Class ImagePost

java.lang.Object
entityClasses.ImagePost
public class ImagePost extends Object

Title: ImagePost Class

Description: This ImagePost class represents an image uploaded to the unified discussion board. It stores the uploader's username, the decoded JavaFX Image, the original filename, and the grid position (row, col) used when displaying images in the forum. Equality and hashing are based on filename and username so that the same image cannot be inserted twice by the same user.

Copyright: Lynn Robert Carter © 2025

Version:
1.00 2026-06-22 Initial version in guiForum package, 2.00 2026-06-23 Moved to entityClasses; renamed from png to ImagePost
Author:
Joshua Sprague, Weiye (Richard) Zhang

  • Constructor Details

    • ImagePost

      public ImagePost(String user, javafx.scene.image.Image pic, String filename, int row, int col)

      Method: ImagePost(String user, Image pic, String filename, int row, int col)

      Description: This constructor is used to establish ImagePost entity objects.

      Parameters:
      user - specifies the username of the user who uploaded this image
      pic - specifies the decoded JavaFX Image object
      filename - specifies the original filename of the uploaded image
      row - specifies the row position of this image in the display grid
      col - specifies the column position of this image in the display grid

  • Method Details

    • set_user

      public void set_user(String user)

      Method: void set_user(String user)

      Description: This setter defines the user attribute.

      Parameters:
      user - is a String that specifies the username of the uploader.

    • set_filename

      public void set_filename(String filename)

      Method: void set_filename(String filename)

      Description: This setter defines the filename attribute.

      Parameters:
      filename - is a String that specifies the original filename of the image.

    • set_pic

      public void set_pic(javafx.scene.image.Image pic)

      Method: void set_pic(Image pic)

      Description: This setter defines the pic attribute.

      Parameters:
      pic - is a JavaFX Image that specifies the decoded image object.

    • get_pic

      public javafx.scene.image.Image get_pic()

      Method: Image get_pic()

      Description: This getter returns the decoded JavaFX Image.

      Returns:
      the JavaFX Image object for this post

    • get_user

      public String get_user()

      Method: String get_user()

      Description: This getter returns the username of the uploader.

      Returns:
      a String of the uploader's username

    • get_filename

      public String get_filename()

      Method: String get_filename()

      Description: This getter returns the original filename of the image.

      Returns:
      a String of the image filename

    • get_row

      public int get_row()

      Method: int get_row()

      Description: This getter returns the row position in the display grid.

      Returns:
      an int of the row position

    • get_col

      public int get_col()

      Method: int get_col()

      Description: This getter returns the column position in the display grid.

      Returns:
      an int of the column position

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object obj)

      Method: boolean equals(Object obj)

      Description: Two ImagePost objects are considered equal if they share the same filename and username. This prevents the same user from uploading duplicate images.

      Overrides:
      equals in class Object
      Parameters:
      obj - is the Object to compare against this ImagePost.
      Returns:
      true if obj is an ImagePost with the same filename and user, else false

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()

      Method: int hashCode()

      Description: This getter returns the hash code derived from filename and username, consistent with the equals() contract.

      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object
      Returns:
      an int hash code for this ImagePost
